metadata.description: Elemental essence materials for enchanting and high-level crafting

items.name: Essence of Earth
items.description: Condensed earth magic, grants stability and defensive properties.

items.name: Essence of Fire
items.description: Burning elemental energy, enhances offensive power.

items.name: Essence of Air
items.description: Swirling air magic, grants speed and agility.

items.name: Essence of Arcane
items.description: Pure magical energy, amplifies spell power.

items.name: Essence of Life
items.description: Vibrant life energy, used in healing and restoration.

items.name: Minor Weapon Essence
items.description: Basic essence for upgrading weapons. Provides +1 to +3 enhancement.

items.name: Greater Weapon Essence
items.description: Moderate essence for upgrading weapons. Provides +4 to +6 enhancement.

items.name: Superior Weapon Essence
items.description: Powerful essence for upgrading weapons. Provides +7 to +9 enhancement.

items.name: Perfect Weapon Essence
items.description: Ultimate essence for upgrading weapons. Provides +10 enhancement.

items.name: Minor Armor Essence
items.description: Basic essence for upgrading armor. Provides +1 to +3 enhancement.

items.name: Greater Armor Essence
items.description: Moderate essence for upgrading armor. Provides +4 to +6 enhancement.

items.name: Superior Armor Essence
items.description: Powerful essence for upgrading armor. Provides +7 to +9 enhancement.

items.name: Perfect Armor Essence
items.description: Ultimate essence for upgrading armor. Provides +10 enhancement.

items.name: Minor Accessory Essence
items.description: Basic essence for upgrading accessories. Provides +1 to +3 enhancement.

items.name: Greater Accessory Essence
items.description: Moderate essence for upgrading accessories. Provides +4 to +6 enhancement.

items.name: Superior Accessory Essence
items.description: Powerful essence for upgrading accessories. Provides +7 to +9 enhancement.

items.name: Perfect Accessory Essence
items.description: Ultimate essence for upgrading accessories. Provides +10 enhancement.
